title: Sphere Seals
body:
# <font color="#85a0cc">**SPHERE SEALS**</font> invaded Minecraft.

## 🦭 What you can do with <font color="#85a0cc">Sphere Seals</font>:

- <font color="#85a0cc">**Pet it.**</font>
- <font color="#85a0cc">**Feed it.**</font>
- <font color="#85a0cc">**Roll it.**</font>
- <font color="#85a0cc">**Love it.**</font>
- <font color="#85a0cc">**Build it a house.**</font>
- **Make it go on world dominatio- <font color="#85a0cc">I mean, wahh?**</font>

## 👀 What <font color="#85a0cc">Sphere Seals</font> can do with **YOU**:

- **<font color="#85a0cc">Stare at you.</font>**
- **<font color="#85a0cc">Roll you over like a bowling pin.</font>**
- **<font color="#85a0cc">Love you.</font>**
- **<font color="#85a0cc">Take you on adventures.</font>**
- **<font color="#85a0cc">Be a derp for your viewing pleasures.</font>**
- **Go on world domina- <font color="#85a0cc">hey now!</font>**

### Look at that <font color="#85a0cc">**SPHERE SEAL GO**.</font>

![A sphere seal rolling really fast.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf0e7dcb4d4808452dbd04c3c2b3b08106f8ef3c.gif)

### What a silly <font color="#85a0cc">**CLAPPING SPHERE SEAL**.</font>

![A sphere seal clapping its flip floppers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866d55bd42517cbbb015ec24ac81dc0d8b5dfd7c.gif)

### So <font color="#85a0cc">**BOUNCY**!</font>

![A sphere seal bouncing around.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08a63fd2d8515b3b679bee52e4d2edff2f45ea2.gif)

### It's sooo cute, if only you could... <font color="#85a0cc">**PET THAT SPHERE SEAL!**</font>

![A happy petted sphere seal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a37a3e609e277fd26423a8a58dcbaacb9e6cdf1.gif)

## ❓ FAQ

### <font color="#85a0cc">Can I eat it?</font>
~~Only if you're an orca~~ **NO.**

### <font color="#85a0cc">Can it eat me?</font>
***Maybe.***

### <font color="#85a0cc">Is it cute?</font>
**Yes.**
